---
title: "Presentations"
listing:
  - id: bobology
    contents: presentations/bobology
    type: default
    # Curated order: Lecture 1 -> Lecture 2 -> Lecture 3 -> Lecture 4.
    # Toggle to date/title still works via sort-ui.
    sort: "order asc"
    sort-ui: [date, title]
    fields: [date, title, description]
    feed: true
  - id: other
    contents: presentations/other
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: [date, title]
    fields: [date, title, description]
    feed: true
---

## Bobology

::: {#bobology}
:::

## Other & Misc

::: {#other}
:::
